questions.text: What is the remainder when $3^{40}$ is divided by 80?
If $a+b+c=9$ and $ab+bc+ca=23$, find the value of $a^3+b^3+c^3-3abc$.
If $x^2 - \sqrt{5}x + 1 = 0$, find the value of $x^4 + \frac{1}{x^4}$.
If $\sin A = \frac{5}{13}$, find the value of $\frac{\tan A + \sec A}{\cot A + \csc A}$.
If $\sin \theta + \cos \theta = \sqrt{3} \cos \theta$, find the value of $\tan \theta$.
In $\triangle ABC$, the bisectors of $\angle B$ and $\angle C$ intersect at point $O$ inside the triangle. If $\angle BOC = 110^\circ$, what is the measure of $\angle A$?
Two circles of radii $10\text{ cm}$ and $5\text{ cm}$ have a direct common tangent of length $12\text{ cm}$. Find the distance between their centers.
The ratio of the sides of a triangle is 3:4:5 and its area is $216\text{ cm}^2$. Find the perimeter of the triangle.
A solid metallic cylinder of base radius $6\text{ cm}$ and height $24\text{ cm}$ is melted to form smaller solid spheres of radius $2\text{ cm}$. How many such spheres can be formed?
A person sells an article at a 16% loss. Had he sold it for Rs. 660 more, he would have gained 8%. What is the cost price of the article?
A shopkeeper marks up his goods by 25% and gives a discount of 12%. Find his profit percentage.

The population of a city increases by 10% in the first year, decreases by 20% in the second year, and increases by 30% in the third year. If the present population is 50,000, what will be the population after 3 years?
The ratio of incomes of A and B is 5:7, and their expenses are in the ratio 9:13. If they save Rs. 4000 and Rs. 5000 respectively, find the income of A.
A and B can do a piece of work in 12 days and 18 days respectively. They started the work together, but B left after 3 days. In how many days will the remaining work be completed by A alone?
Pipe A can fill a tank in 8 hours and Pipe B in 12 hours. Pipe C can empty the full tank in 6 hours. If all three pipes are opened together at 10 AM, when will the completely empty tank be full?
A train traveling at $80\text{ km/h}$ crosses a $250\text{ m}$ long platform in 27 seconds. Find the length of the train.
A boat takes 4 hours to travel $36\text{ km}$ downstream and 6 hours to travel $30\text{ km}$ upstream. Find the speed of the river stream.
A sum becomes 3 times of itself in 8 years at simple interest. In how many years will it become 6 times of itself at the same rate of simple interest?
The difference between the Compound Interest and Simple Interest on a sum of Rs. 15,000 for 2 years is Rs. 96. Find the rate of interest per annum.
The average of 11 numbers is 60. The average of the first 6 numbers is 58 and the average of the last 6 numbers is 63. Find the 6th number.
Two vessels A and B contain mixtures of milk and water in the ratio 4:3 and 2:3 respectively. In what ratio should these be mixed to form a new mixture containing half milk and half water?

X, Y, and Z invested in a business in the ratio 2:3:5. The ratio of the time duration of their investments is 4:5:6. If Z's profit share is Rs. 15,000 more than Y's profit share, find the total profit.
A tangent PQ and a secant PAB are drawn to a circle from an external point P. If $PQ = 12\text{ cm}$ and $PB = 24\text{ cm}$, find the length of the chord AB.
If $\sin \theta + \csc \theta = 2$, find the value of $\sin^{100} \theta + \csc^{100} \theta$.
If $x = 2 + \sqrt{3}$, find the value of $x^3 - \frac{1}{x^3}$.
